title: Thaam Dhoom
desc: Gautam goes to Russia for a conference and gets arrested after the police find a dead woman in his hotel room. He escapes from the custody and tries to find the real murderer to prove his innocence.

title: Madharasa Pattinam
desc: Amy, the wife of an English governor, falls in love with Parithi, a villager, and they run away. However, they are caught and she is taken back to London. Years later, she comes back in search of him.

title: Thirupathi
desc: Trimurti learns that his pregnant sister died due to a corrupt doctor's negligence who did not get a bribe. When he decides to take revenge, he finds out that the doctor is his boss's brother.

title: Naachiyar
desc: Naachiyaar, a diligent and determined police officer, sets out to catch the culprit who raped Arasi, an underage girl who is being hidden by her uncle and his henchmen.

title: Intha Vara Special
desc: Exclusive festive special featuring candid celebrity interviews, Tamil cinema updates, and behind-the-scenes stories that bring fans closer to their favorite stars.

title: Velli Thirai
desc: Kannaiyan, a struggling actor, steals a script written by Saravanan and gains fame. Saravanan decides to make another movie but faces a lot of challenges.

title: Sivi
desc: A young photographer and his girlfriend accidentally kill a woman while coming back from a party. The ghost of the deceased woman later starts haunting the couple leading to some shocking revelations.

desc: This book dives into the fascinating world of Tamil cinema, revealing intriguing unknown facts about famous personalities, driven by the extraordinary desires that shape their lives.

desc: A young man with dreams moves to Chennai and works at a men's salon, striving to achieve his goals while adapting to city life.

title: Nayagan
desc: Velu Nayakan, who witnesses the brutal murder of his father, kills a corrupt policeman and escapes to Mumbai, only to become a gangster.
